variants: Sorrel Bascombe is a notable figure residing on Ivystone Path. An expert in the Philosophy of science, they have significantly contributed to the field by authoring the influential work, Clockvine Assembly Technique. Sorrel's contributions have been recognized with the prestigious Peridot Lotus Citation. In addition to their academic pursuits, they are also an active member of the Knights of Slipstream, a contemporary society dedicated to advancing philosophical discourse.
